revision.text:
==Japanese Content== {{Commonscat|32 ban Shokunin utaawase}} 『'''[[三十二番職人歌合]]'''』に関するカテゴリ。
{{デフォルトソート:さんしゆうにはんしよくにんうたあわせ}} [[Category:Categories needing translation of Japanese explanatory text]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[sn:" to "[[Category:sn_crud|TEST"
revision.text:
==Japanese Content== {{Commonscat|32 ban Shokunin utaawase}} 『'''[[三十二番職人歌合]]'''』に関するカテゴリ。
{{デフォルトソート:さんしゆうにはんしよくにんうたあわせ}} ==Local Content== {{Commonscat|32 ban Shokunin utaawase}} {{citation needed|さんしゆうにはんしよくにんうたあわせ}} {{translated page|1=ja|2=Category:三十二番職人歌合}} {{translated page|ja|Category:三十二番職人歌合|version=64802756}} [[co:commons:Category:32 ban Shokunin utaawase]] [[ja:Category:三十二番職人歌合]] [[Category:sn_crud|TESTThis category was created from JA→Wikidata links on :Category:獅子舞]] {{wikidata link|Q9540221}} [[Category:1494]] [[Category:15th-century books]] [[Category:Categories needing translation of Japanese explanatory text]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese explanatory text to translate to english]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]] [[Category:Culture of the Muromachi Period]] [[Category:Emakimono]] [[Category:Enumerations of 32]] [[Category:jawiki pages with translated titles]] [[Category:Original categories]] [[Category:Tier 2 Categories]] [[Category:Tier 2 Categories with no enwiki]] [[Category:Tier 2 Categories with no enwiki but with commons link]] [[Category:Uta-awase]] [[Category:wikimedia commons named categories]] [[Category:Categories]] [[Category:Categories]]
